name: CMDB Explorer
description: ServiceNow CMDB Configuration Item explorer with dependency graph visualisation. Search, view, create, update, and delete CIs, and explore upstream/downstream relationships.

conversation_starters.text: Show me all Configuration Items in the CMDB
Search for servers in the CMDB
Show the dependency graph for our production database
What CIs are owned by the infrastructure team?
Create a new CI for our new application server
